actionUnits.condition: Validate MonoBehaviour settings match HoseHandleMovement (script guid f3c735cd07257d448babb6fb31e61089, component fileID 1917998009). Awake initializes: isTurning=false; step=rotationSpeed*Time.deltaTime; onRotation=(-45,0,0); offRotation=(-112,0,0); transform.localRotation set to offRotation. Object has BoxCollider so Trigger is allowed; no Rigidbody so no Grab/Transform.

Turn handle ON path. Requires invoking HoseHandleMovement.ActivateHandleMovement(true) (bool param) to set isTurning=true and rotate toward onRotation. Since no UnityEvent m_Calls are configured and the only public no-arg method is getIsTurning(), an external binder or test hook is needed to call ActivateHandleMovement(true).

Turn handle OFF path. Requires invoking HoseHandleMovement.ActivateHandleMovement(false) (bool param) to set isTurning=true and rotate toward offRotation. No UnityEvent m_Calls present; needs external binder or test hook to call the method.
